title: Rich explain.md format with gate detail table and acceptance checklist
summary: Rewrite explain.md generation to produce a rich decision document including gate condition detail table, builder execution summary, acceptance criteria checklist, suggested review focus, and file change summary.
builder_prompt:
## Goal
Make explain.md a comprehensive decision surface for the dogfood workflow.

## Steps
1. Update src/spec_orch/services/artifact_service.py write_explain_report method:
   - Accept additional parameters: verification details, builder metadata, acceptance_criteria list, workspace path
   - Generate markdown with these sections:
     a. '# Explain Report for <issue_id>' header with title
     b. '## Verdict' section with mergeable status and blocked_by
     c. '## Gate Conditions' table with one row per condition (condition | status | notes)
        - spec_exists, spec_approved, within_boundaries: pass/fail
        - builder: pass/fail/skipped
        - verification.lint, verification.typecheck, verification.test, verification.build: pass/fail with exit code
        - review: pass/pending/changes_requested
        - human_acceptance: accepted/pending
     d. '## Builder Summary' section: adapter, compliance status, final message excerpt (first 200 chars)
     e. '## Acceptance Criteria' section: render each criterion as a markdown checkbox
        - Auto-check items that can be verified (e.g., 'All tests pass' checked if verification.test passed)
     f. '## Suggested Review Focus' section: list items based on failed/warning conditions
     g. '## File Changes' section: if workspace is a git repo, include git diff --stat output
2. Update the method signature in artifact_service.py
3. Update all callers in run_controller.py to pass the new parameters
4. Update tests that assert on explain.md content
5. Run the full test suite

## Verification
python -m pytest -q && python -m ruff check src/

context.architecture_notes: After SPC-P0-2, _finalize_run handles all explain report writing. The Issue model now has acceptance_criteria field. The explain.md is the primary review surface in the dogfood workflow.
constraints: All existing tests must pass (update assertions as needed)
File changes section must gracefully handle non-git workspaces

acceptance_criteria: explain.md contains a Gate Conditions detail table
explain.md contains a Builder Summary section
explain.md contains an Acceptance Criteria checklist with auto-checked items
explain.md contains a Suggested Review Focus section
explain.md contains a File Changes summary
